candidates.why: For a bank, this is the closest top-line revenue/sales equivalent and is the main total income line above expenses and operating profit.

variables.notes: Candidate list for REVT was empty. For a banking income statement, there is no standard 'Revenue' row; 'Total operating income' appears to be the best available top-line equivalent, so selected from the full preview.
No clear COGS/cost of sales concept is present in this banking income statement. Banking statements typically do not report COGS.
